title: Hydra scheduled autopickup state
description: Runtime state for scheduled autopickup. See CLAUDE.md 'Scheduled autopickup' + docs/specs/2026-04-16-scheduled-autopickup.md.

interval_min.description: Minutes between ticks. Clamped to [5, 120] on activation.

auto_enable_on_session_start.description: Opt-out session-start behavior. Missing = true for backward compat.

last_run.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last tick, or null if never run.

last_picked_count.description: Number of tickets spawned in the most recent tick.

consecutive_rate_limit_hits.description: Strike counter for the 2-strike rate-limit auto-disable rule.

last_retro_run.description: ISO-8601 local timestamp of the last scheduled or manual retro, or null if never run. Drives the Monday-09:00-local idempotency guard in the autopickup tick. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-scheduled-retro.md.

last_promotion_run.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last skill-promotion tick (scripts/promote-citations.sh). Drives the once-per-day gate inside the autopickup tick. Null or missing means never run. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-skill-promotion-automation.md (ticket #145).

last_audit_run.description: ISO-8601 local timestamp of the last scheduled worker-auditor run. Drives the DAILY idempotency guard in the autopickup tick (section 4d) so the auditor is recommended at most once per day: audit_due = (date(last_audit_run) != today). Null or missing means never run. Commander stamps this when it spawns the auditor; the tick only reports. See docs/specs/2026-06-07-scheduled-self-audit.md (ticket #240, daily cadence; supersedes the never-implemented Monday-only #179 hook).

tickets_at_last_hygiene.description: Cumulative ticket count at the last memory-hygiene compaction. The autopickup tick computes tickets_since = tickets_total - this; when it reaches the threshold (default 10) the tick emits a compact-memory marker. Commander resets this to the current cumulative total after running compaction. When the field is ABSENT (never written) the tick treats the baseline as 0 (never run). Commander always writes an integer here, never an explicit null, so the field stays integer-typed and validate-state-all passes. See docs/specs/2026-06-06-autopickup-tick-orchestrator.md (ticket #239). NOTE: the daily-digest scheduler state (enabled / time / last_digest_run) lives on state/digests.json — its CANONICAL home, written by ./hydra connect digest — NOT here. The autopickup tick's section-4f digest step reads digests.json directly; see docs/specs/2026-06-08-digest-tick-step.md (ticket #266).
